account_number_masked.description: The response will contain the bank fintech ID (3 or 6 digits) plus the last 4 digits, with the digits in between replaced with * characters. Shadow mode account numbers will not be masked.

account_purpose.example: This account for the account holder's salary deposit.

application_id.description: The application ID for this account.

balances.description: A list of balances for account based on different type

creation_time.description: Account creation timestamp in RFC3339 format

currency.description: Account currency or account settlement currency. ISO 4217 alphabetic currency code. Default USD

customer_ids.description: A list of the customer IDs of the account holders.

is_account_pool.description: Account is investment (variable balance) account or a multi-balance account pool. Default false

is_ach_enabled.description: A flag to indicate whether ACH transactions are enabled.

is_card_enabled.description: A flag to indicate whether card transactions are enabled.

is_p2p_enabled.description: A flag to indicate whether P2P transactions are enabled.

is_wire_enabled.description: A flag to indicate whether wire transactions are enabled.

last_updated_time.description: Timestamp of the last account modification in RFC3339 format
